name: Team Corey
subject: Weekly Update - New internal poll!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=1)
---
Peter -- We're now coming up on the final stretch of the campaign. Only 3 weeks left to go and we just received some BIG news! The campaign conducted a poll last week and we're releasing the numbers to you first. See below! We're finishing up our **Make Fairfax Safe Tour** to rid the county of MS-13, releasing 2 different radio ads that are running daily across the commonwealth, and making thousands of calls every week! Check out our weekly update and ways you can help below. **WEEKLY VOLUNTEER CONFERENCE CALL**
You're invited to join a conference call with Team Corey every Tuesday night at 8 pm EST. Dial (515) 739-6200 Access code 896695
* * *
**Internal Poll
** The campaign recently conducted an internal poll that we would like to share with all of you first.

* **Stewart leads all other candidates 3 to 1.**
* Stewart 32%, Freitas 9%, Jackson 5%.
* Stewart has a commanding lead with younger voters under the age of 50!
* Stewart 42%, Freitas 11%, Jackson 4%
* Previously undecided voters are moving to Stewart at a better
than 5-1 ratio.
* Stewart holds a strong 31-8 favorable/unfavorable rating with 77%
name ID.

Stewart holds a strong lead with three weeks to go and continues to build momentum as he heads toward the finish line. We want to thank all of our great volunteers and donors for helping us get to this point. You can read the full campaign memo [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2FVirginia-Poll-Memo-052118.pdf&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=2).
* * *
**WE NEED YOUR HELP MAKING CALLS!**
We are so close to our goal! If everyone reading this email can call 500 people or spend 5 hours on the phones for Corey before the end of May, we will reach our goal of 100,000 calls. To sign up, go to [**www.coreystewart.com/phone**](http://www.coreystewart.com/phone?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=3) or contact your local field representative. _If you're already making calls, please start calling Hanover!_
* * *
**_"Corey Stewart is a fighter who will be a staunch defender of our rights and liberties in Washington. I'm proud to announce my endorsement of Corey Stewart for U.S. Senate in Virginia. Corey is a proven vote-getter who will win back Virginia’s U.S. Senate seat for conservatives._** **_President Trump needs a fighter like Corey in the U.S. Senate to help clean up th e swamp in Washington. It is vital that we turn the tide in Virginia so that President Trump's agenda can succeed. With that in mind, I urge Virginians to back Corey Stewart for U.S. Senate.” - Jerry Falwell Jr. _**
* * *
**VOLUNTEER OF THE WEEK**
Congratulations to this week's Volunteer of the Week, **Mary Meehan**! Mary has been one of our most valuable team members collecting over 1,500 signatures and knocking on almost 2,000 doors during the campaign! Thank you, Mary!
* * *
**WOULD YOU LIKE TO HOST COREY?**
If you are interested in hosting a Meet & Greet or Fundraiser for Corey, please contact Heather Mitchell (540) 645-1767 to get one set up today!
* * *
**Upcoming Events!** **Stewart in Herndon
** Corser Residence
12462 Wendell Holmes Rd
Herndon, VA 20171
May 23, 2018 at 630pm - 830pm
[RSVP Website](https://www.coreystewart.com/meet_and_greet_in_herndon?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=4) \- [RSVP Facebook](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fevents%2F361208444365142%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=5) **_Rally in Loudoun for Corey
_** _Joe's Pizzeria Restaurant_ _
22360 Sterling Blvd
Sterling, VA 20165
May 26, 2018 at 2pm - 4pm
[RSVP Website](https://www.coreystewart.com/meet_and_greet_in_loudoun_20180526?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=6) \- [RSVP Facebook](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fevents%2F1874391209519907%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=7)_
* * *
**IN THE NEWS** \--- **Stewart Releases New Ad "Winner" Highlighting His Winning Record While Leading As A Conservative** Entitled "Winner", the ad spotlights Corey Stewart's record of winning in blue Northern Virginia while leading as a conservative cutting taxes, leading the nation's toughest illegal alien crackdown, and being the first in Virginia to protect kids by putting retired cops in schools.

You can watch the video version [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2211081398908688%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=8), or click on the image below. [](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2211081398908688%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=9) On May 23rd, Fairfax will stop cooperating with ICE's request to detain criminal illegal aliens when they have one of the WORST MS-13 problems in the country. Watch Corey's speech below on how to stop it at one of his stops on his **Make Fairfax Safe Tour!** Watch the video [here.](facebook.com/CoreyStewartVA/videos/2217152781634883/) Stewart is by far the strongest candidate on the Second Amendment with a record to back it up. **Under Corey's Leadership, Prince William will be the first county in Virginia to put retired police officers in our schools!** Check it out by clicking [here. ](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwtop.com%2Fprince-william-county%2F2018%2F04%2Fprince-william-co-looks-hire-retired-police-officers-grade-schools%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=10) **Un der Stewart's leadership, FitchRatings has reaffirmed Prince William County's triple-AAA bond rating, a rating earned by less than 2% of counties nationwide. All three bond-agencies. _
_**_Check out Stewart's record as a fiscal conservative[here.](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpwcchairman%2Fphotos%2Fa.1600263473420522.1073741832.1596958217084381%2F1614449925335210%2F%3Ftype%3D3%26theater%26ifg%3D1&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=11) _
* * *
**What Corey will fight for in the Senate:**
* _Build the Wall_
* _Cut Taxes and Simplify the Tax Code_
* _Repeal Obamacare and Lower Your Premiums_
* _Revive Manufacturing and Bring Back Jobs_
* _Protect Our History and Heritage_
* _Pass National Concealed Carry Reciprocity_
* _Defund Planned Parenthood_
* _Improve Veterans’ Healthcare_
* _Rebuild the Military_

_See all issues at CoreyStewart.com/issues._
* * *
**Why Corey's the best Candidate to defeat Kaine:******
* _Won 4 times in a blue Northern Virginia County. Only Republican to do so since 2009._
* _Outperforms all Republicans in Northern Virginia_
* _Has the support of the Trump Base._
* _Only countywide elected Republican in Northern Virginia._
* _Won over 75% of counties and cities in Virginia's Southwest, Southside, and Shenandoah Valley regions in 2017 Republican Primary._

**_Stewart unveils Immigration policy_**
* **_Click[here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fcoreystewart%2Fstewartimmigrationpolicy&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=12) to read _**
* _"I pledge to be the strongest advocate in the U.S. Senate on Immigration by fighting tirelessly to implement the following":_
* _Mandating immigration checks of arrests (mandated 287g)_
* _Including the citizenship question on the U.S. Census_
* _Turning Census Bureau information on illegals over to ICE_
* _Arresting and prosecuting sanctuary city officials_
* _Ending Chain Migration_
* _Defunding and ending DACA_
* _Building the Wall - the WHOLE wall._
* _Ending the Visa Lottery_

_**Join our[Grassroots Page](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fgroups%2Fgrassrootsforcorey%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=13) on Facebook by clicking [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fgroups%2Fgrassrootsforcorey%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=14) to keep updated daily. **_ Best, Matt Brown
Campaign Manager
mbrown@coreystewart.com Stewart for Senate
[http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=15)

| | Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc.____
---
Stewart for Senate · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=16).

Created with [NationBuilder](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_22&n=17), software for leaders.

name: Bryan Caforio
subject: Keep us on the air!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
---
[](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d38438c/169f49de/342655cb/33866d9c/3679478413/VEsH/ "http://bryancaforio.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")

| | | [**_We need to raise $8,000 by Friday morning to keep our digital ad up and running. Chip in now and help us meet our goal._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+raise+8000+by+Friday+morning+&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")
---

Peter,

All women should be able to make their own decisions about what to do with their bodies, plain and simple.

But Trump and his anti-choice lackey Steve Knight don't see it that way. They want to rob millions of women from their right to choose and they want to destroy Planned Parenthood.

Our latest campaign ad affirms my commitment to fight for reproductive freedom. I need your help, Peter, to broadcast it to as many voters as possible.

[**_Please CLICK HERE and help us raise $8,000 by 7am Friday morning so we can fully fund this important message._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=3+-+Please+CLICK+HERE+and+help+us+raise+8000&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$10 ](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=4+-+asknbsp&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1") | [$25 ](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=5+-+asknbsp&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1") | [$50 ](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=250&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=8+-+asknbsp&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1") | [Other](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=9+-+Other&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")

**Election Day is in two weeks! Now is the time to get our message out there.**

Our team is committed to ensuring that all women have the right to choose. We know most people in CA-25 are too.

Now we have to make sure we get our message to voters. But we need your help to make that happen.

[**_Help us reach our big Friday morning goal. Click here to chip in now._**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=10+-+Help+us+reach+our+big+Friday+morning+goa&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")

[](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-digiad-watch?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&refcode=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")
Thank you for joining us in this important fight.

Bryan

---
The son of two public school teachers, **Bryan Caforio is a Yale Law School graduate and former federal law clerk who will use his skills and experience to hold Trump accountable.** Bryan will fight to pass Medicare for All, protect our environment, and defend Dreamers. He's the progressive candidate who's been endorsed by dozens of local officials, labor unions, and the majority of delegates at the California Democratic Party Convention.

We're running a grassroots campaign that relies on getting the message out to supporters like you. If you're fired up and ready to flip our district, you can contribute by clicking [here.](https://secure.bryancaforio. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-footer?amount=10.00&refcode=footer&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1&source=BC_EM_FR_180DO_180522_1_1")

Our latest campaign ad affirms my commitment to fight for reproductive freedom. I need your help, Peter, to broadcast it to as many voters as possible. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" | "" | "" ---|---|--- "" | "" | "" Election Day is in two weeks! Now is the time to get our message out there. Our team is committed to ensuring that all women have the right to choose. We know most people in CA-25 are too. Now we have to make sure we get our message to voters. But we need your help to make that happen. "" "" Thank you for joining us in this important fight. Bryan The son of two public school teachers, Bryan Caforio is a Yale Law School graduate and former federal law clerk who will use his skills and experience to hold Trump accountable. Bryan will fight to pass Medicare for All, protect our environment, and defend Dreamers. He's the progressive candidate who's been endorsed by dozens of local officials, labor unions, and the majority of delegates at the California Democratic Party Convention. We're running a grassroots campaign that relies on getting the message out to supporters like you. If you're fired up and ready to flip our district, you can contribute by clicking "" | "" "" "" 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy #548 Valencia, CA 91355 "" | | PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I need you involved, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- Less than six months stand between us and Election Day. That may feel like a while, but November will be here before we know it. In the meantime, it's absolutely critical that we're doing everything we can to turn out the vote. That means taking some time to volunteer. [**_Help make the team as strong as possible -- sign up to volunteer now._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaa2/4462dc26/5d0a1de3/2007e079/296807421/VEsH/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/e180522volunteer") In the past year, I've been so impressed with all the activism I've seen. Supporters like you are marching, you're dedicating time to the causes that matter to you, you're speaking up on our country's most pressing issues, and uplifting the voices of your friends and neighbors -- because all of our stories make a difference. Your participation in this democracy matters, and I can't thank you enough for the work you're already doing. Now it's up to all of us to keep the momentum going strong. [**_Be a part of this team. Add your name now if you 're ready to volunteer._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaa2/4462dc26/5d0a1de3/2007e079/296807421/VEsE/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/e180522volunteer") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: I believe that we will win.
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3099/9e00690/476d080f/240208f0/1959745420/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180522_GAwin_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180522_GAwin_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

Tonight my friend Stacey Abrams won her Democratic primary in Georgia, and in the process helped show the world that we need to toss out the old political playbooks that tell us what we can and can't do, or who should and shouldn't run.

We're running an unapologetically progressive campaign, talking about how we raise wages for working people, invest billions more in our public schools and teachers, and finally end this epidemic of gun violence.

**[They might have doubted us once upon a time -- but with less than 100 days until the primary, it's ours to win. Can you chip in $5 right now to build on this momentum?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3099/9e00690/476d080f/240208f3/1959745420/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ga-primary-win?gpsid=13_55_699&refcode=em18_180522_GAwin_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180522_GAwin_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+They+might+have+doubted+us+once+upon+a+t")**

There's a growing wave across America that is going to redefine what it means to win again, and I know that momentum is coming to the Sunshine State in our August 28th primary.

More than ever, I know that we are going to win.

Let's bring it home,

Andrew

name: Dana Bye
subject: What we've built
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,
As Abigail's campaign manager, I keep track of a lot of numbers. Here are a few that I think really define the incredible grassroots, people-powered campaign we've built:
* 1,266 registered volunteers
* 3,482 individual donors, with 1,850 living in the 7th District
* 99 meet & greets (#100 is tonight!!!)

[**But the number I 'm focused on most right now is $6,350**](https://act.myngp.com/el/674HjZwBTsJb_o-Lvw-pC7GdwZE_dANR2arkEJ2Rpyw=/4eOGkje63N4xJssw22xg5sj7Jw2I9nFEmAC_7r4WIq0=?refcode=may23AM) -- the amount we have left to raise by midnight tonight to keep our two ads on air and our incredible field team well-resourced during these final weeks.

Can you help us close the gap by donating right now?
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/674HjZwBTsJb_o-Lvw-pC7GdwZE_dANR2arkEJ2Rpyw=/4eOGkje63N4xJssw22xg5sj7Jw2I9nFEmAC_7r4WIq0=?refcode=may23AM)

When I joined Abby's team last July, I had no idea we would inspire this many people to action. But we have, and Dave Brat should be very worried. Our campaign has an authentic grassroots excitement that he can't match.

Tonight's deadline is so important, Peter, and we wouldn't be this close to our fundraising goal without your help. [Thank you for stepping up and pushing us over the top](https://act.myngp.com/el/674HjZwBTsJb_o-Lvw-pC7GdwZE_dANR2arkEJ2Rpyw=/4eOGkje63N4xJssw22xg5sj7Jw2I9nFEmAC_7r4WIq0=?refcode=may23AM).

Best,

Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_

P.S.: If you've already donated to our end-of-quarter goal and this email accidentally made its way to your inbox, thank you! We truly appreciate your support!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/674HjZwBTsJb_o-Lvw-pC7GdwZE_dANR2arkEJ2Rpyw=/iHb40JAWAnz86d5ds7duM11Ck8VYm-1zU2srNSJoOUc=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/674HjZwBTsJb_o-Lvw-pC7GdwZE_dANR2arkEJ2Rpyw=/oCHKqqYsX59F1Q3xTPm2DNLZeama2PXAYR__VMMowng=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

subject: Thank you for joining our movement
body:
Dear Peter,

I really appreciate your interest in our campaign. I'm running for Congress to be a voice for the working people of Central Texas, and your support means a lot to me.

Please don't hesitate to email me at mike@siegelfortexas.org, or post to our Facebook page, if you'd like any more information about me, our campaign, or the issues facing our district in this upcoming election.

Thank you again for your support.

- Mike

name: The White House
subject: President Trump to talk immigration, MS-13 in New York
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e5d357cfb24af7df99e38bae835016aea3219bfa4ca02e1ad01f2cbe7ff0dac9cd26052fd0f09c01dbe81984e6da608fad) The White House • May 23, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will visit the Morrelly Homeland Security Center in Bethpage, New York, for a roundtable on immigration and MS-13. [Watch live at 2:00 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e516e08c99fd872cda24b631813b016bb9fbfdeeb0082c51cca8a06716bb85eafec1a31bef0a2d4d4ecffd6c1788746bbb) |
---
|

## Ending taxpayer support of the abortion industry
**President Trump spoke at Susan B. Anthony List's** 11th Annual Campaign for Life Gala last night. Susan B. Anthony List is the Nation's largest pro-life organization with more than 600,000 members. "When I ran for office, I pledged to stand for life. And as President, that's exactly what I've done," President Trump told the group last night.
**The Trump Administration is preserving the sanctity of life** with policies that end taxpayer support of the abortion industry. Regulations proposed this week from the Department of Health and Human Services would require clear physical and financial divisions between programs that receive Title X family planning funding and programs that perform or support abortion as family planning.
**The President's defense of American values** includes pro-life priorities--and much more. In defense of religious liberty, the Administration issued conscience regulations that protect healthcare providers such as the Little Sisters of the Poor from having to choose between violating their moral beliefs or shutting their doors.
[Watch highlights of President Trump's speech at the Campaign for Life Gala.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e5c7b59e11021e51df2792c576514bc4efd178c89d1fa7bb1d46a30c839bc086f7adbd42ac52d75e75b336c7ff409bbbc1)
**More** : [How this President is preserving the sanctity of life and defending American values ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e57cb20fb43dd34a75b3e393586f2c83cd35e2a6b5d0025ba3287b82572a285d0fb4731162b8b1a3cd2be39b5e75d0ea6f)

---
|

## President Trump's 'dramatic and positive' achievement
**South Korean President Jae-in Moon visited the White House yesterday** , speaking with President Trump about recent developments in North Korea. The US-South Korea bilateral comes weeks before President Trump's planned summit with Kim Jong Un in Singapore.
**"President Trump has been able to achieve this dramatic and positive change** that you see right now," President Moon said. "There have been many agreements between the United States and North Korea previously, but this will be the first time that there will be an agreement between the leaders."
**President Trump emphasized that next month's summit is contingent** on North Korea's willingness to engage on key issues, including denuclearization. "There are certain conditions that we want, and I think we'll get those conditions. And if we don't, we don't have the meeting," President Trump said. "It has a chance to be a great, great meeting for North Korea and a great meeting for the world."
[Watch President Trump welcome President Moon to the White House.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e50d0eb941679c513ddb2da4a829307b1453d6d044cd9c4f6724583ffcd99119aae8223c34c964e9ac326b73651dec63d4)
**Go deeper** : [President Trump's full remarks before yesterday's meeting with South Korea ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e5f425f67dfac8da495d3e1f25dc3aa59c796199f88f0760f8e86cb6348b8a5ee4da066f9f2cbccc1b5894b22e38dd5aef)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump meets with President Moon Jae-in of the Republic of Korea** | May 22, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e54537b4fdb35ef8c931ba33b36d3e0d1265722d504d2127e2e2960be2e392c4931edf4a7e7d150f71316408fb0c9c41b7) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a4c3d9586fd0e9e53bafecad94890054ea696d5a9d973142ea9c4c664b62aed5689e1ebcb5e8d5676f9d8a988cd8f378298b357fbe34bbf7) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d420103bbb8d1b7da11b59610e4d7116c31cac101d83d7f1951d697a0f1a0bf2a16511b37ea8e7c87fc3a8dafc68db510f8b82a7d8b0124020)
---

name: Xochitl Hinojosa
subject: Add your name: Stand with Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Sign on to stand with Planned Parenthood against the Trump administration's latest attack
---
Yesterday the Trump administration proposed a new rule to block millions of women from accessing critical reproductive health care. I would like to take a moment to tell you why this move is so disturbing, and then ask you to take action to oppose it.

There's a program called Title X that provides 4 million Americans with affordable birth control and reproductive health care. Under Trump's proposal, these patients would no longer be able to go to health care providers -- like Planned Parenthood -- that offer abortion services or referrals for needed care.

This is a brazen and shameful assault on women, our rights, and our health. By undermining Title X, Trump is threatening the health of millions of women across the country and their families -- and right now I am counting on you to speak out against this outrageous policy.

**Add your name to say you oppose Trump's proposal to block women's access to reproductive health care by restricting Title X.**

**[I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a14b/2704813147/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/protect-title-x?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd")**
This new rule not only takes health care away from women -- it also prohibits doctors and nurses from referring their patients for safe and legal abortion. It even allows doctors to withhold information from women about their own medical options.

Make no mistake: This proposed rule is just the latest attack from the Trump administration on quality, affordable health care.

We should be expanding access to preventative care, cancer screenings, STD testing, birth control, and family planning services including abortion. Instead, Donald Trump and Mike Pence are once again turning back the clock on women's reproductive freedom by telling women what we can and can't do with our bodies.

The Democratic Party believes that women have the right to make our own reproductive health decisions -- and we will fight tooth and nail to protect a woman's constitutional right to an abortion.

**[Donald Trump's proposal to upend Title X and jeopardize women's reproductive health care is a complete disgrace. Add your name if you agree.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a148/2704813147/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/protect-title-x?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Donald+Trumps+proposal+to+upend+Title+X+&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd")**

Thank you for taking a stand today.

Xochitl

Xochitl Hinojosa
Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

**[DONATE](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a149/2704813147/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-title-x/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd")**

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a156/2704813147/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a157/2704813147/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a154/2704813147/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e0d/4067b0a/598b5a3dc/7e47a155/2704813147/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180523_xh_nd&source=em_20180523_xh_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Introductions: Friends, meet Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
_This is our "Introductions" series. We ask you to support a lot of strong Democrats, and we want to make sure you know who they are and why they have Team Maggie's endorsement. We hope you enjoy getting to know them._
You know Tammy Baldwin as the Democratic Senator from Wisconsin who championed allowing young people to stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26.
She's also a native Wisconsinite who was raised by her grandfather, a biochemist at the University of Wisconsin, and her Nana, a seamstress and head costume designer in the UW Theater Department.
When Tammy was younger, her mother struggled with mental illness and prescription drug abuse. Tammy knows firsthand what so many families are going through with the opioid epidemic, and she has emerged as a leader in the fight to end it.
Tammy made history as the first openly gay member of the United States Senate, but that's not why she first ran.
She ran for public office to make a difference in the lives of families struggling to find work and pay bills, students worried about debt, seniors concerned about their retirement security, and veterans who fought for us and need someone fighting for them.
Making a difference is exactly what she did as a member of the House, and it's exactly what she does every single day as a United States Senator.
[**Tammy has our endorsement, and if you 'd like to join us in supporting her reelection campaign, you can click here to donate $3 or more.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf41/2a380d31/9bc712f/f19ee5/2387083768/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDUyM19JbnRyby1CYWxkd2luX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20180523_Intro-Baldwin_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you,
All of us on Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf41/2a380d31/9bc712f/f19ee5/2387083768/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDUyM19JbnRyby1CYWxkd2luX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20180523_Intro-Baldwin_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
subject: Another senseless slaughter in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ZARVqDAzOUb6CryG9jHK1cPHOGgjf-Qxr4T2ktbNGg=/b_DwoMeoux47EbGdOQivXi23jsZa14RivefT0vFnaRs=?refcode=May-23-TX)

Friend,
This is unconscionable.
**Ten more lives snuffed out in a school shooting in Santa Fe, Texas.** And this time, the school had an "active shooter plan" and two armed security officers patrolling the hallways.
How can our legislators keep paying lip service to improving school safety while kids and teachers are being slaughtered?
[**Help me take a sledgehammer to NRA-backed roadblocks to common sense gun law reforms with your contribution of $5 or more.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ZARVqDAzOUb6CryG9jHK1cPHOGgjf-Qxr4T2ktbNGg=/b_DwoMeoux47EbGdOQivXi23jsZa14RivefT0vFnaRs=?refcode=May-23-TX)
The Texas shooter's father -- whose weapons were used in the massacre -- is an NRA supporter and vocal gun owner. He says his son was "bullied" at school.
The Texas Lieutenant Governor blamed it on violent movies, video games and abortion.
It's the classic right-wing scam written in the blood of high schoolers: Blame gun violence on everything but guns.
[**This insanity has to stop. Please give whatever you can and help me scream truth to power.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ZARVqDAzOUb6CryG9jHK1cPHOGgjf-Qxr4T2ktbNGg=/b_DwoMeoux47EbGdOQivXi23jsZa14RivefT0vFnaRs=?refcode=May-23-TX)
I will not rest until we put serious reforms in place.
Thanks for standing with me,
**\- Mary Barzee Flores**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ZARVqDAzOUb6CryG9jHK1cPHOGgjf-Qxr4T2ktbNGg=/b_DwoMeoux47EbGdOQivXi23jsZa14RivefT0vFnaRs=?refcode=May-23-btn-TX)

Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Breaking news: Poll released
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, I have breaking news that is going to make your day! ... And maybe ruin Josh Hawley’s ;) We conducted a poll with Gravis Marketing that shows that I am the best candidate to defeat Claire McCaskill in November. The polling shows that I beat McCaskill by 6 points more than Josh Hawley. But it gets even better... We received 14 percent more than Hawley did against McCaskill among women, 22 percent more among Republicans and 42 percent more among young people. Friend... Do you realize what this means? It means that ALL of your work has paid off. Let me be clear about this: We are leading Claire McCaskill because of all the phone calls, donations, and online actions you have taken to support this campaign. There is no way I could do this without you. Yesterday, I emailed you about the momentum our campaign is experiencing. Trust me, I was expecting good news from this poll. But I did not expect this!!! [**Friend, this is our moment. We are going to WIN this election. We have the momentum. Our message is winning. We CANNOT let this opportunity go to waste. | | Friends, Folks, we have a lot to talk about in this edition. We are tentatively scheduled to open our campaign headquarters in Biloxi and Hattiesburg for June 1st. At that time we will be fully staffed and ready to begin mobilizing campaign tactics such as mail-ins, phone banking, canvassing and more. We are hiring student interns to help work with our campaign for the summer. Application submissions should be sent to the campaign no later than May 25th. Information on where headquarters are located and how to submit intern application is listed below. We will be hosting our Primary election watch party at our Hattiesburg location. We hope to see our H-burg supporters there. This Friday evening, I will be on the Lavish show with Shira Stallworth talking about my campaign and the importance of voting. The show airs on WGUD at 7:00 p.m. I hope you folks tune in. HEADQUARTERS:BILOXI HQ (MAIN) LOCATED AT 134 RUE MAGNOLIA, SUITE C, BILOXI, MS - OPENING JUNE 1ST HATTIESBURG HQ LOCATED AT 2018 HARDY STREET, HATTIESBURG, MS - OPENING JUNE 5TH INTERNSHIP OPPORTUNITY:APPLICATIONS MUST BE TURNED IN BY MAY 25TH. YOU CAN ACCESS THE APPLICATION ONLINE UNDER JOIN TO ACTION. YOU CAN ALSO ACCESS IT BY USING THIS LINK - [docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSenykR3Kg3t7fkScLivsrfc87U8wVt75VgKTZgg4T9kq3njTA/viewform](https://u6371721.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=JILbql1UFnMuMynxZZdqsz8dbVmdiMYivedr6dOXANxg1o3HhQvt1fS-2F7kcYpXudfa4c-2By-2FMiwyYhmcDRJW34qjlFHY8IkDaLuN-2BPiED9260pmXxBZ-2FpsiXT6d3Wd-2FJfHomc-2BPfxmA2Wt-2FLruuo5-2BQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFTZG3zAd2sHA7NWAFdIVBI9RFff3LT9SeaNHbznmcIEHAuF7am4T37j6lrKiq-2F8mDvLS3RChfhxvin5lBS4JOGTT2rLXoVWvJohzWQ0c7pLnfWXmRXLuV6gNw4CDyalUwhohia6UVkMjkPHb-2FA9gw4oqXDMIFK9zrm-2Bkf4nK71GxColidiNAL1Iawpabd7nX5EUwmRskBL1dUSkqEo3dpbuk0-2FhoNQ2HD1Ou-2BehywNYgjGbRehM1WRAPR-2Fv5ME7Z7pnYiyKg8ENrFqZWOhgcRZwniBQIhQfjQrkllSG3vX6xqjrMGEHSSJ0dflIi68hmjnolI3HscNfsKIQvcvpM5z-2BvdGnK-2BDw1c-2Fjit4HIshk4DK3fkK6A-2Fk15fa6NggV1ME09gk1DbZQPFFHCCSsuBHR78IGHNkats6yY7JQinIqkQBeM6-2BNB1tMygiToV8F3-2B2p4uOAv3CAmTJo7VCbSWr8-2BJbZskM6u7E8tF2vXnKbMqK1HsAH0P-2FKFVVKjmSdsR4QBShSbKHqJf1PdYQLuKL) Upcoming appearances: FRIDAY, MAY 25THInterview by Shira Stallworth on the Lavish Show broadcasted by WGUD TV. 7:00 P.M. name: Troy
subject: what I don't like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
| | | | [ ](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-f/)
---
Peter,

There are many things I like about running for office. Meeting and hearing from so many great Montanans across the state. Knowing that I’m going to get rid of the entrenched special interests in Washington, D.C., and there is nothing the career politicians can do about it. Fulfilling my call to serve this great state and great country.

But what I don’t like is asking hard working folks for financial support...but I have to.

If you haven’t heard, the Democrats in Washington have their eyes on Montana. They’re nervous about our race, scared that they won’t be able to keep us in check.

Jon Tester, his buddy Elizabeth Warren, and all of their extreme liberal friends are doing everything they can to stop me. They plan to pour millions of dollars into Montana to try and hold on to their seat and I can’t compete with that kind of money without your help.

So I have to do what I dislike...[if you can contribute $25, $50, or even $100](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-z/), not a dime will be wasted by my campaign. As a self made business owner and entrepreneur I understand the value of a dollar and I will never take your support for granted.

I know you agree with my message of smaller government, less regulations, and a freer Montana, but [I need your help](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-v/) to spread it, and every dollar raised will help me do just that.

Any support you can provide is greatly appreciated.

Called to Serve,
Troy

[DONATE](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-s/)
| [](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-g/) [](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-w/)

---
PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U.S. SENATE
Click [here](http://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-u-aihhdj-yhdyitiujj-yd/) to unsubscribe.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: A monumental win
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb309a/9e00690/47779e93/240209b8/2464080490/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180523_GAwin_fnd_gq_nono__AG&source=em18_180523_GAwin_fnd_gq_nono__AG")
Friends,

Last night my friend Stacey Abrams won her Democratic primary in Georgia, and in the process helped show the world that we need to toss out the old political playbooks that tell us what we can and can't do, or who should and shouldn't run.

We're running an unapologetically progressive campaign, talking about how we raise wages for working people, invest billions more in our public schools and teachers, and finally end this epidemic of gun violence.

**[They might have doubted us once upon a time -- but with less than 100 days until the primary, it's ours to win. Can you chip in $5 right now to build on this momentum?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb309a/9e00690/47779e93/240209bb/2464080490/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ga-primary-win?gpsid=13_55_699&refcode=em18_180523_GAwin_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180523_GAwin_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+They+might+have+doubted+us+once+upon+a+t")**

There's a growing wave across America that is going to redefine what it means to win again, and I know that momentum is coming to the Sunshine State in our August 28th primary.

More than ever, I know that we are going to win.

Let's bring it home,

Andrew

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb309a/9e00690/47779e93/240209ba/2464080490/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ga-primary-win?gpsid=13_55_699&refcode=em18_180523_GAwin_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180523_GAwin_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor

clean_body: "" Friends, Last night my friend Stacey Abrams won her Democratic primary in Georgia, and in the process helped show the world that we need to toss out the old political playbooks that tell us what we can and can't do, or who should and shouldn't run. We're running an unapologetically progressive campaign, talking about how we raise wages for working people, invest billions more in our public schools and teachers, and finally end this epidemic of gun violence. "" There's a growing wave across America that is going to redefine what it means to win again, and I know that momentum is coming to the Sunshine State in our August 28th primary. More than ever, I know that we are going to win. Let's bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Did you see this article about Beto in Time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Hey there, I wanted to make sure you saw: _TIME_ magazine just published a great feature about Beto. They joined us on the campaign trail for a few days to get a feel for the energy on the ground. Their team really captured some awesome stories and photos.
[**Click here to check out Beto 's feature in _TIME_ magazine. And when you're done, share it with your friends and family so they can see what we're up to and learn more about why this campaign is so important**.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92eb1/3b1d797/7c041882/35a87b9e/3506581715/VEsH/ "http://time.com/longform/beto-orourke-texas-democratic-senate-race/")
Here's a quick excerpt:

O'Rourke with performers at the Mariachi Loco Music Festival in El Paso. _TIME_ magazine.
O'Rourke is betting that it runs through the hinterlands. He has spent more time than any other Democrat in recent memory visiting towns across Texas, including all 254 counties. He says he sees two currents of disaffection that work in his favor: Democrats are eager for new leadership. And some Republicans don't like the GOP's direction under Trump. "I mostly vote Republican in national elections, but I'm so disgusted with what's taking place," a 72-year-old cattle rancher and self-identified conservative named Bill Martin said after O'Rourke's town hall in Carrizo Springs. "The body politic is kind of like the human body. The liberal faction represents the heart, the conservative faction represents the mind, and the body needs both to stay alive." Martin said he was leaning toward voting for the Democrat.
_TIME_ | May 22, 2018
Our campaign is making waves across Texas, and it's all thanks to support from people like you. You're allowing us to refuse access to the PACs, corporations, and special interests. You're allowing us to run this campaign the right way: by focusing 100% on people.
**[Every person who reads this profile in _TIME_ magazine will get an insider's look at life on the campaign trail and how hard Beto is working for us -- but we need your help to make sure it reaches more people. Simply click here to read _TIME 's_ profile on Beto, then please share it with your family and friends.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92eb1/3b1d797/7c041882/35a87b9e/3506581715/VEsE/ "http://time.com/longform/beto-orourke-texas-democratic-senate-race/")**
**[Share on Facebook](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92eb1/3b1d797/7c041882/35a87b9f/3506581715/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftime.com%2Flongform%2Fbeto-orourke-texas-democratic-senate-race%2F")**
**[Share on Twitter](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92eb1/3b1d797/7c041882/35a87b90/3506581715/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=Check%20out%20this%20great%20article%20about%20%40BetoORourke%20in%20%40time%20%0Ahttp%3A//time.com/longform/beto-orourke-texas-democratic-senate-race/")**
Thanks! We'll talk soon.
Chris Evans
Beto for Texas
**[P.S. It's going to take a lot more than good press to win this race, especially with Ted Cruz's Super PACs rallying. Chip in right now to make sure Beto knows you have his back through every tough fight we'll face.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92eb1/3b1d797/7c041882/35a87b91/3506581715/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180523-time?refcode=ema180523&amount=3")**

clean_body: Hey there, I wanted to make sure you saw: TIME magazine just published a great feature about Beto. They joined us on the campaign trail for a few days to get a feel for the energy on the ground. Their team really captured some awesome stories and photos. "" Here's a quick excerpt: O'Rourke with performers at the Mariachi Loco Music Festival in El Paso. TIME magazine. O'Rourke is betting that it runs through the hinterlands. He has spent more time than any other Democrat in recent memory visiting towns across Texas, including all 254 counties. He says he sees two currents of disaffection that work in his favor: Democrats are eager for new leadership. And some Republicans don't like the GOP's direction under Trump. "I mostly vote Republican in national elections, but I'm so disgusted with what's taking place," a 72-year-old cattle rancher and self-identified conservative named Bill Martin said after O'Rourke's town hall in Carrizo Springs. "The body politic is kind of like the human body. The liberal faction represents the heart, the conservative faction represents the mind, and the body needs both to stay alive." Martin said he was leaning toward voting for the Democrat. TIME | May 22, 2018 Our campaign is making waves across Texas, and it's all thanks to support from people like you. You're allowing us to refuse access to the PACs, corporations, and special interests. You're allowing us to run this campaign the right way: by focusing 100% on people. "" "" "" Thanks! We'll talk soon. Chris Evans Beto for Texas "" * Paid for by Beto for Texas

Thank you for joining Congressman Lewis and committing to vote for Stacey Abrams.

| | Now that the primary is over, we have a lot to do Peter. Trump's hand-picked candidate, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, already raised $4.5 million. Polls show Trump's standing on the rise and this race tightening up. We have to get ads up and lawn signs down. We have gas tanks to fill, volunteers to feed, calls to make, doors to knock, and a million other things to do. I don't think I need to recap for you all the things at stake in this election.
Special interest groups are not my biggest fans. I'm fighting like hell for Ohio families -- not the billionaires and big corporations that funnel money through special interests.
I fight to expand access to health care and restrict the amount of outside money in our elections. I fight to defend Planned Parenthood, Medicare, and Social Security. I want education to be more affordable and the minimum wage to be livable.
Special interests don't want any of that. It's why back in 2012, they spent more than $40 million to make me what one news source called "the Hunted Democrat." And this time around, I'm expecting more of the same.
But just like in 2012, if we all do our part, we can win. **And we do it all with an average online contribution of $26.**
[**_Peter, I need you to help us reach our first big goal of the general election. Give whatever makes sense for you -- maybe match that $26, if you can._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaa6/4462dc26/5d2e6ef5/2007e0a2/4218447466/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180523nd?refcode=sbe180523nd_a&amount=26")
And know that when you give, you are helping us fight not only to win in November, but to protect our shared values.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: 10 of our women WON last night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bbe/24c69fd9/1ba8260b8/188e8a2f/2354004481/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact")
---

Peter,

I'm so proud: 10 of our pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot either won or advanced to a runoff!

Here are a few of the highlights:
* We are one step closer to electing the first black woman governor EVER. Stacey Abrams -- the first woman to win our Rising Star Award -- won her primary for Georgia governor.
* Also in Georgia, Carolyn Bourdeaux and Lucy McBath both advanced to run-off elections for their House seats. And all five of our state and local women won their races, including three who can flip seats in the state House.
* Two of our House candidates in Texas won their run-off elections. Now Gina Ortiz Jones and Lizzie Pannill Fletcher have to pivot and turn these seats blue in November.

I hope you're excited about these wins, Peter. And fired up to win some more.

Because we have 44 women counting on our support to win their special and primary elections on June 5th.

**[Donate $3 to keep this momentum going and help pro-choice Democratic women win next month.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bbe/24c69fd9/1ba8260b8/188e8a28/2354004481/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180523_email_GATXPrimaryElectionReport?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+keep+this+momentum+going+and&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact")**

Georgia and Texas are not easy states for Democrats to win in. But this is our year, and we've endorsed the best candidates to do it.

Just this past weekend, I had the privilege of spending time with Team Abrams in Georgia to help get out the vote. The energy was electric -- people are excited about our candidates and all they stand for.

I am so proud of what this community and our women accomplished last night, and I can't wait to see what November brings.

But to get there, we need to send the same level of support we gave our women in Georgia and Texas to all of our candidates on the ballot this year.

**Donate $3 to keep helping pro-choice Democratic women win:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Keep-Winning](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bbe/24c69fd9/1ba8260b8/188e8a29/2354004481/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180523_email_GATXPrimaryElectionReport?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgKeepWinning&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bbe/24c69fd9/1ba8260b8/188e8a2a/2354004481/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180523_email_GATXPrimaryElectionReport?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFEQ56N_digital_email_20180523_GATXElectionReport_inact")

|

name: Jason Yates
subject: Church Resources for You to Share!
body:
| | FREE to Download and Use
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fthink%2Fchurches%2Fresources&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180523com01&n=1)
| Peter, I need your help with something important while we are still in the primary election season for most states. There are over 10,000 critical elections taking place at the local, state, and national level that will decide issues related to life, religious liberty, family values and how we care for those in need. Yet, millions of Christians will sit on the sidelines and fail to vote. We can’t afford for this to happen this year. You can do something about this! We want to see churches across the nation take a stand and encourage Christians to vote. We are sending our non-partisan My Faith Votes Toolkit out to as many churches as we can, but we need to reach more. Will you help by sharing this toolkit with your pastor? [Check out these church resources and share them with your pastor!](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fthink%2Fchurches%2Fresources%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180523com01&n=2)
* In-Service Church Videos
* In-Service Slides
* In-Service Voting Announcements
* Do’s and Don’ts for Church and Government: Know Your Legal Rights

Primary elections are the best opportunity Christians have to choose Godly leaders who uphold Biblical and Constitutional values to run in the November general elections. If Christians don’t select strong candidates now, we may be disappointed with our options come November. Together, let’s work to see 90-million Christians stand united in the public square for Christian values! Thank you for standing with us. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180523com01&n=3) P.S. [Click here for the church toolkit.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fthink%2Fchurches%2Fresources%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180523com01&n=4)

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: re: urgent call to action
body:
Wagner loves Wall Street...and Wall Street loves Wagner
---
| | | | | |
---
| Another Wall Street giveaway;Dodd-Frank rules repealed for most banks
---
| | |
---|---
|
When the banks started collapsing in 2007 and 2008, politicians didn't think twice before handing over $700 Billion to help banks weather the storm.

Meanwhile, families in Affton, Arnold, Chesterfield, and O'Fallon saw high unemployment, plummeting home values, and crushing foreclosures.

Not a single banker has been prosecuted, and now, Wall Street is running the show through its bought-and-paid-for politicians, just as before. [Rep. Wagner just voted on a bill that exempts many banks from certain requirements of Dodd-Frank that protect consumers and investors.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cO8yfp1HPDDOoBWIN42ooYfdTkuryD24RxacFM4kLFH0MljxyopqSGBakpu828zlUQta4IF7NdVxmPf8azV0jeCm2E7EKRcanNjoMLezpwa-jQshH7Noo73LA9Gw3jhKZVBDmwifAO1rErLvZVXWHBQy7I9UHiessAE5GhB-NHn3RWSyJEgPPbYw0fn7DvzWlRQ1T5ERPa_xA-Hh7pkspa7oFWYGpekgOIUrA45ZWWXc4oKKqIdIhv8iNH8Lr4-x9J45N5-r_NT9Y0CnePyFtdPUNk5ABR5LPKTiKWZhu4sWQE2Wt38oVa7veEYPmENkiUtlHqWkyUiZGYOG2sT36cBiikzNrKSbfOkZwTQ2W_qaoRwVx1ppgK20i8udF7piy7eUTGsJiHw20ZHnCRl4uX0NQ6QT8x0Y&c=4zWzFnbW-bYZ6yaydgzaCCrVf2vlcqcbJGlcRWcso7nPJOCl9ZrzrA==&ch=_OgLKQzSsEamD_Sfl8ZbAS0jOC971syjkRbxsQAaTfwJ-EEmWys5xw==)

This year, we have a chance to hold pro-Wall Street politicians accountable, and send a representative to Washington who will do what's best for real people -- not the billion-dollar banks and corporations.

But in order to push back against extremely well-funded corporate interests, we need your financial support.

[Help us continue building the broad coalition it will take to beat Ann Wagner. Your contribution of $25 lets us produce 3 yard signs and a T-shirt, or get up to 4 volunteers started knocking on doors. Want to make a bigger impact? Give the max, $2,700, and help us send union-printed direct mail about Ann Wagner's anti-worker record to 5,000 homes in the district.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cO8yfp1HPDDOoBWIN42ooYfdTkuryD24RxacFM4kLFH0MljxyopqSNja6FOWDaUUrLohbqxItougeBcb2qZDm3vKguR_3J6ucnHv94NKMQ6K4-_JLbva5LxID400gLu9QNUi7XO05OZRUEWPGednXIV9oHgAv0m_2QyAkSIQb88_SryqQ-jbD4Op5Cw-tJuHZNjx5AJz9WprANyrOmA0yDICZvg9E2I6ej8YQmW4fJnHP2rG8r4jlQ==&c=4zWzFnbW-bYZ6yaydgzaCCrVf2vlcqcbJGlcRWcso7nPJOCl9ZrzrA==&ch=_OgLKQzSsEamD_Sfl8ZbAS0jOC971syjkRbxsQAaTfwJ-EEmWys5xw==)

If you've given or volunteered already, thank you, and if not, we hope you'll join the campaign today.

We can, and will, make our government better. I will never forget where I came from, and the needs of those who sent me to Washington.

Very respectfully,

Mark J. Osmack

name: John Bessler
subject: Will you sign my card for Amy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

I wanted to take a moment of your time to talk about my wife, Amy, and a surprise my daughter and I have in store for her. Amy's birthday is coming up on Friday, and Abigail and I would love to give her a card from all of her supporters. [**Will you add your name, and then forward this email to three friends so they can add theirs?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3P86MtHjCPdaHQe%2B1Nd1C5ak%2FgEC2aO%2B)

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=v4wbuNZ7f98rS3z0RwcMPpak%2FgEC2aO%2B)
---

I see every day how hard Amy works to get things done for Minnesotans in the Senate. I can't think of anything that would make her happier on her birthday than the best wishes from the people she represents.

[**Will you sign the card for Amy and leave her a note with your best wishes?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=P6Gv4jn0DKy57XtNdlHvOBETeR83IviA)

Thanks,
John

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Tonight marks 100
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

I'm about to walk into our 100th meet and greet, but before I do, I wanted to quickly tell you about our first one way back on August 10, 2017.

On that warm summer night, more than thirty 7th District residents gathered at a home in Henrico. I introduced myself to the group, spoke about issues, and answered questions. The questions quickly became an impassioned group discussion. A man spoke of his experiences volunteering with the homeless community, a woman talked about her health care concerns, a neighbor worried about the unpredictability of the President. Many in the room were new to politics, but they got excited about the prospect of change that evening.

Some of them have since hosted events for our campaign, establishing our early path towards engagement across the district. Many of them continue to volunteer. That evening was the first of many that have left people feeling hopeful. Back in August, people were starting to believe that a "Blue Wave" was on the horizon.

They were right.

With each passing election, be it a Special Election or Primary, we are seeing incredible Democratic turnout and candidates, especially women, winning by running with integrity and a commitment to service.

**The 7th District will be no different, and that 's why I'm asking for your help once more before our midnight deadline. **

We are just $2,765 away from our goal and with a donation from you right now I know we'll hit it. [Will you give $25 or more to help us finish strong?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-w7iAeVlXlzaT1DuGeUQcF15T4g0JeIymD4ZB5_g6V4=/eJ6SSTZkcsN5yKb35bJi07tJWBG3Lvn8mGhIl-7Ydso=?refcode=may23pm)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-w7iAeVlXlzaT1DuGeUQcF15T4g0JeIymD4ZB5_g6V4=/eJ6SSTZkcsN5yKb35bJi07tJWBG3Lvn8mGhIl-7Ydso=?refcode=may23pm)
We can flip this seat, Peter, and I can't wait to attend the next 100 meet and greets to make sure we do.

Thank you for everything.

Abby

P.S.: If you've already donated to our end-of-quarter goal and this email accidentally made its way to your inbox, thank you! We truly appreciate your support!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-w7iAeVlXlzaT1DuGeUQcF15T4g0JeIymD4ZB5_g6V4=/v1IPUuXPF2QuTp9uHppMUKdkOC98aHjlxTYm1VjD2aE=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/-w7iAeVlXlzaT1DuGeUQcF15T4g0JeIymD4ZB5_g6V4=/hU0Exd4h5E1EdfBl2cYeNoKe_3bEGUh2oz6DQFRGZYM=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-w7iAeVlXlzaT1DuGeUQcF15T4g0JeIymD4ZB5_g6V4=/KQXSocXj_0VhUXwBcIjH8NrpP3NheSbP4CVvoAPinQA=).

name: Ben Jealous
subject: We're making history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
What a moment.
#

Friend,
We're one step closer to making history.
Last night, my good friend Stacey Abrams won the Democratic gubernatorial primary in Georgia -- which makes her one step closer to becoming the first black female governor in the country.
We know black women are the backbone of the Democratic party -- we wouldn't have elected Doug Jones in Alabama or Ralph Northam in Virginia without them. It's inspiring to see the women who show up every election in the voting booth finally have a chance to stand in the Governor's Mansion, too.
**I'm so proud of Stacey -- and I wanted to send her a card congratulating her on this huge accomplishment.[Add your name next to mine and sign the card congratulating her on winning her primary and hopefully making history in Georgia this fall!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd24/2894084042/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/congratulate-stacey-abrams?source=OHQ05238A")**
Stacey and I go way back as organizers in Mississippi -- I even have a picture to remember it by:
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd24/2894084042/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/congratulate-stacey-abrams?source=OHQ05238A")
Back then, she told me a story: That she traveled on a city bus with her parents to the Georgia Governor's Mansion so she could be honored as one of the state's smartest and best students.
Now this was 1991 -- not the 1960s. Can you believe a security guard wouldn't let them in until they triple-checked that she was actually invited? The truth is, unfortunately, you don't forget that kind of prejudice.
It's something we've all faced, and it's why it's so inspiring to me, and to millions of others across the country, that we're seeing more and more black women and men at the top of the ticket.
When Stacey walks into the Governor's Mansion as Georgia's next governor, she represents the future of the party. I hope I get to join her and make history in our Governor's Mansion, too.
**[Join me in congratulating Stacey Abrams for winning her primary, and hopefully making history this fall as the first black female governor in America.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd24/2894084042/VEsF/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/congratulate-stacey-abrams?source=OHQ05238A")**
Thanks,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd27/2894084042/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ05238A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd26/2894084042/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd21/2894084042/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62e/7ab0e2c4/7f8dc0d8/349bbd23/2894084042/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: This is what a 50 state strategy looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Take a quick look at what just happened: Stacey Abrams won the gubernatorial primary in Georgia and is on track to be the first black female Governor in US history.
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab63/bed43eb/6dd5e2c2/75fdcb06/4292243098/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180523-suba&noskip=true")
Friends,
Take a quick look at what just happened:
* **Stacey Abrams** won the gubernatorial primary in Georgia and is on track to be the first black female Governor in US history.
* **Sheikh Rahman** defeated a 14-year incumbent to become the first immigrant elected to the Georgia State Senate.
* **Lisa Ring** , chairwoman of the Bryan County Democratic Committee and Co-Chair of the Georgia Sanders Delegation to the DNC, is taking on an incumbent Member of Congress.
* **Shelly Hutchinson** is a mental health worker who won her primary for State Representative in Georgia and is poised to turn a red district Bernie Blue.
* **Paul Walker** is running an uphill race openly supporting the DREAM Act against a very anti-immigrant incumbent Republican Member of Congress in Kentucky.
* **Adrian Wallace** , a progressive minister who ran on pro-voting rights, pro-higher education access, and pro-sustainable environment campaign, is headed to a runoff in the Lexington-Fayette County Council At-Large seat in Kentucky.
* **Maureen Skinner** , a first-time candidate and child-rights advocate, won her primary for State Senate in Arkansas.

Take a look at these states again. Georgia, Kentucky, Arkansas--the establishment would have us believe that these are "red" states. But we are proving them wrong.
Progressive messages and extraordinary candidates can win anywhere. Even in areas that have long been neglected by the Democratic Party.
Our Revolution members around the country are doing the work, friends. Together, we volunteered, knocked on doors, sent over 2 million text messages and made hundreds of thousands of phone calls. It's about what we're fighting for--a $15 minimum wage, pay equity for women, Medicare for All. You didn't let these elections be determined by the insiders, the big money interests, or the status quo politicians playing to the middle. Your time, energy, and a few hard-earned dollars made the difference and ensured progressive candidates will be on the ballot in November.
[**Thanks to you, we have the opportunity to turn parts of our country blue that have been under Republican control for decades --and it's not just any old blue. Chip in $5 to turn these "red" states Bernie Blue.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab63/bed43eb/6dd5e2c2/75fdcb06/4292243098/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180523-suba&noskip=true")
Last week, progressive victories swept Pennsylvania, Oregon, and Idaho. This week it's Arkansas, Georgia, and Kentucky.
California, New Jersey, New Mexico, Iowa, Alabama, and Montana are up next. There are over 150 local groups working in these states to make sure progressives win--and more than 600 groups across the country. They're holding organizing meetings, helping to get out the vote, and building their groups for a sustained push from now until November.
[**We have another big day coming up on June 5 and we want to make sure we're out there, paving the way for more progressives in government. Pitch in $5 to help us get our local groups the support they need for the final push before these primaries.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab63/bed43eb/6dd5e2c2/75fdcb06/4292243098/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180523-suba&noskip=true")
You're helping build the momentum to take our country back from those who think they can buy our elections. Let's keep it up, keep winning elections, and keep building the political revolution.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab63/bed43eb/6dd5e2c2/75fdcb06/4292243098/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180523-suba&noskip=true")**

All women should be able to make their own decisions about what to do with their bodies, plain and simple.

But Trump and his anti-choice lackey Steve Knight don't see it that way. They want to rob millions of women from their right to choose and they want to destroy Planned Parenthood.

Our latest campaign ad affirms my commitment to fight for reproductive freedom. I need your help, Peter, to broadcast it to as many voters as possible.

Our team is committed to ensuring that all women have the right to choose. We know most people in CA-25 are too.

Bryan

The son of two public school teachers, **Bryan Caforio is a Yale Law School graduate and former federal law clerk who will use his skills and experience to hold Trump accountable.** Bryan will fight to pass Medicare for All, protect our environment, and defend Dreamers. name: Delegate Mike Caputo
subject: We're going to have to do this ourselves..
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,

We just left the special session called by Governor Justice and I have to say the Republican Leadership is even _further_ in chaos than they were during the regular session. It’s clear that they are not listening to the people of West Virginia. The special session proved what we’ve known all along and sadly, that’s the fact that Republican Leadership is continuing the attack on West Virginia working families and our most vulnerable while positioning themselves and the top 1% for the election in November.

It’s disappointing to me that even though West Virginians were heard loud and clear about their need for medical cannabis, the Republican Leadership refused to put it on the agenda. The lack of compassion for these folks by the Republican Leadership is unbelievable. West Virginians battling illness could dramatically benefit from this legislation and instead of fixing the banking issue to make this possible, Republican Leadership in their usual style pushed it to the side and **said no.**

[It’s **CLEAR** that if we’re going to get anything done for the people of West Virginia, it’s going to have to be done BY the people of West Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1269241/6984654/-1666006964?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkYWM2Mi1lMzVlLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDBkM2ExMjU2NTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LhQH3LaPTY74KDjUjrrS3LB2ckZkJYS1QSUIlkRcJg=) I joined the **Fight for 55** because I will always stand alongside West Virginia families and workers to ensure that they get the representation and compassion that they deserve. [Enough is enough, are you with us in the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1269242/6984655/-1666006964?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkYWM2Mi1lMzVlLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDBkM2ExMjU2NTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LhQH3LaPTY74KDjUjrrS3LB2ckZkJYS1QSUIlkRcJg=)

I may come from Marion County, but Democrats together will always fight for the people of West Virginia in all 55 counties.

Sincerely,

_Delegate Mike Caputo_

West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0529f9d4-c25e-e811-80c3-000d3a125653/bb6dac62-e35e-e811-80c3-000d3a125653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkYWM2Mi1lMzVlLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDBkM2ExMjU2NTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0LhQH3LaPTY74KDjUjrrS3LB2ckZkJYS1QSUIlkRcJg=&id=106970630&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
