name: Leah Vukmir
subject: are you crazy, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" -- but they never use those words to describe the left.

Friend,

The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" – but they never use those words to describe the left.

But... when liberals want to march to overthrow a freely elected president or call for a repeal of the 2nd Amendment, it's fine.

Then, when conservatives like us stand for our values, we're lambasted as "crazy." Talk about a double standard!
[STAND WITH LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgN-Z5YjTDnCeAE8atyr8zwNZaQOpEe8dFVdOzdswvxJK405RbPy1F0wRBhP1B_yjyqYbTSknOCTHfQOFFLFxA96-EZ73PklvvZbpefaQ5ho9t1NpoYnEuZU_u6Phu8YvDaudgZaWu54XnKnArykpdK_nOg08YvsYvibZ5qfEBmThzrnP1E7kOQ9lGcRgJMkCOVvf1wtJVehX7MkNQ_uCHw-6MOg_DkTOOol7oEo3e4dXwZPS4zfmjEouAxiYkEqASKUYWIT0ooHXAx8eJ0vW9PzuZpIe4WukX9ebXTMzZ_qXZgh3OKTA2pxHWhnzHhsT5rFo4g3fuoLJ4Pg4TAMbm2cqmBMyCkFhbfJ2MqdjmH3HR33NJggfQ7oUTvC1pYfV3JcXiC9flasLKDZulvfacQM%3D)
---

I don't think it's "crazy" to stand for our Constitution.

It's not "crazy" to want Wisconsin families to have opportunities for work.

I don't think it's "radical" to want low taxes, fewer regulations, and less government in the way of our lives.

It’s not "radical" to say that we should protect the lives of the unborn.

I KNOW the people of Wisconsin agree with me on this.

But we know the liberal media is out of touch, and they're not backing down from their biased reports anytime soon. So, I'm just going to embrace it.

[**And I want crazy conservatives like you to join me.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgN-Z5YjTDnCeAE8atyr8zwNZaQOpEe8dFVdOzdswvxJK405RbPy1F0wRBhP1B_yjyqYbTSknOCTHfQOFFLFxA96-EZ73PklvvZbpefaQ5ho9t1NpoYnEuZU_u6Phu8YvDaudgZaWu54XnKnArykpdK_nOg08YvsYvibZ5qfEBmThMN89yP3PRpIU2MmW18B5Vicn_7G9M8FhqvJeE4lcQaWDsVkkfH5AVlmMnhsNfL7sCKFme2aTxgwjeq0aSQRvdb0onFccumPrehXYP2uRYHLoKUPFsedlVGp9D8VfKhraWh6u69k8elhGcqs2xMBpg8EWTeAYOUKsbUZkntAyPNi_e3q4JKATQiAB4H4nwqOyChSBYV3jphVvh64jAG9X7QhD5P0gkOXkNJ8tO_8J8vY%3D)
[I'M A "CRAZY" CONSERVATIVE, TOO](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgN-Z5YjTDnCeAE8atyr8zwNZaQOpEe8dFVdOzdswvxJK405RbPy1F0wRBhP1B_yjyqYbTSknOCTHfQOFFLFxA96-EZ73PklvvZbpefaQ5ho9t1NpoYnEuZU_u6Phu8YvDaudgZaWu54XnKnArykpdK_nOg08YvsYvibZ5qfEBmThmPQDXyXAqNK4iWavSArj2OTNJeTzI6h6X0KSFFQsdsCGTYw9iZfGwQ50FWO_W9-Zc-SXsxH1Sv0zB-uHji-zIw_wBkdceTXJo0RqxLOFvNQgZjSYztJ2y088jCnJC-NRmDoC1FbebPQf7Ttqk82qzfwMLtJlXXj0ec9zfR7USuPylm40K48sRLRcaIKw_E2-XE332kgzEzG8ko7eYK4rSsm5rlMN_F3GHxYWgrJoq6E%3D)
---

I've accomplished so much by standing by my principles. Side by side with Gov. Walker, we transformed Wisconsin in ways they said weren't possible. I'm not about to back down.

If it's so "CRAZY" to be conservative, then call me crazy.

I'm not changing.

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgEem84dTQ95yDin1uAuA8El9oPuOhGrlAcjzlqz17rjGJzZ0Nwr4M5b14bxCuOsMQNK7-pho96S5tB2baIYXl57oHtTqcn-3Cbzy7CUWT4qGQuOzneZvt05PA00y9o7AjdPUA0-2OMtjIUDTAQjzl_q7UnRoyyGNWTk81najqqcin0fZwcqAvvAjJ8M-pQiVvpYRirMsWVyfLC3s40aEIfCpwrtAiNPj_EEjRz-pvilNgtjY30QLUU_tj7EWHiIifw%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgLkSN_Eytk3_yliuAljpYvZP7OwCNlqv3nXiAlFSqJovG1Mg7ZaV-3O-VT90AyL1IIa7jCYeqGey36AQupwC3Va0n9Z0hddN8gV5picSKBNtSWeV-KmxXfcnh6FSrqtbBZKwYgnbrl6UeeSvPr6ZZPZtC13yk5VhLhTCsTbIgJaDmgPIFb9LNNY4AzWIUe1COtL5SMPRM8nOKH07jvK-7297Zj5nAn-1_y6ErwPh4NH18oEzfBj9Td50799_wSC6-A%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=iCIf7Iez7UY-uhIs0pPZRB8paQ859ytHKVSKPIfeJcB0UOAQk2pkq3GRXVilBzbYv8mwuQShEbpcNPA9NuwqnWKqNUAT5yACfzpSASLkfGwQDx4054Ey6Fw9cXi9k6iZCSfiFOJJFOFQl5o7LpT9lIoLR3oZaVGXXIQmXzOggaKoA7LHzesvMTAoB8mWvyshrP5Q5yHrAoIL7QswtsGTryTGnH9fL_-umlkXzcOFkQILt2kuPm_I96e2lqa6fe4E). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgLS6ke1SBVJXg-KqducAMlnrV8twu3pTPsQm_BB7Poekpo7jLFDc8jWRUyteQLZ1xgMUk3T1l3bgjrNKDflC55bK25BZFHFiTwrheGy3x8YeznWtafKFZiNghfqsBXP_ijDhXktRTIuqHN3mdIoMpyn7wjKp8Fymce5QGLEg3D6Dx08-GWruD3Z47MsHg8e3dzcCpykqE_Bgjik0vSJNz57dWA5-358xHtDQGgviQHfQhES1bNY9whprLr8B6ApQ_-27zjPQZgwwinX10WK3tg9wvaK22Tf4ijzVJ0xiD2hshvj-sS1l4LDbdlJF-gBr4C_cnit1TGbSoR0ww5TpkoR3Mw6upUzlZ8TEQgpNkGyI) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgLS6ke1SBVJXg-KqducAMlkxo-YElsK39XKRbGrPOgDM93gHa4JcwlcmwB_8_fUPYb_azyz_pz211FcaRnNNduUeCpmPTdAQtusxO3lQ1fc_DEZ5ahhzbvjKSfz-q8ycrzKfkvhHY4PSLV7Q_XFrkldEYURAq1KJACfxtJxY2qWP3xJxNimUrRHiDwhPNNmppmpwPRq-y2I4FSqnu1mYNsPuul9iyboZ1Zjhul3TjiJLoj-dPI2IEBKWDPSaf9Iqkf9f4j8PvSSZJs_Ov2XhQq15LXNQ9Ea21HuzNWFOcghclwFiHgInSYpnoIw08MFAZCT5YTjGbvTGBxR8dV97yCJ_uGfJX-8l_3pqvUnU3ORC) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgEem84dTQ95yDin1uAuA8El9oPuOhGrlAcjzlqz17rjGTi6ipE3XbJ-yICJYxhe8wcBzBNMzoSgeaKkSJ_iG0PBJ5OTQQ5Iipi5zixQrWTvcwUMJAhZrYSB0nO4KEFYdVegqLwALjFyna16fKazHueB_sCIrrEuECDA4x6HlI2it34otuC0mp_VhhTh4JHiObYz2cXhj0yX_32_v40zEhwyP2KJ_ONo-0CrhussfWSgDm-Do265HMuY4TMIGekV7pg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgLkSN_Eytk3_yliuAljpYvZP7OwCNlqv3nXiAlFSqJov6zuGnrQZW_d7N1yM7gjdaASd1jetkLiYeaOBS4ngLL2VOckk7lJn4lQ7dtok1aQ229UKw5G6JslcM0BPTiMyDjZqZe_k9RYLl9b1eQpMik2iLisUTF4lNzISkVE9PMvXQ0eV0KSTJg6ecnJJiKekb2uy5p-nRUEoAYM3gDyErFa90BpT9KlCTGRP5nvpwscd-w-f-GM0wAALHLObSLPdgQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgI3BQ7X2FgathmWeXhgldoE94ivd-lrL6P9YXTyIUyGMudhXVuEJJ7PifzitP6PEhfP5loufCbilGhWSIpOHLKF3bkQAXU7bObbwHmU8mpV2BhHsd4tdGdnKRxm1bNhpv3DLjScGXx6Tmecw63PKW1-lWMBDTNThuB4UBHVfgJFxkYEMOJ0DsrCAMPA0fG91ymbGsPaHMIM0GKAEzDB10hZH9k2Ta5AfcXn5LMpJEobQVn7gyGg9H9VQxTkuRi-D4Q%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=Hyp5j9h_qtQOx4AIpuWHgLS6ke1SBVJXg-KqducAMlkirJVanXAo6XVlL85PhHdQNYZDAa2Ac4oKo84qGTj_QGUjmyn_3-lE5-3y4CysL-K_6UQ1TqW7ecN7-lZoQ7_KrB8P5CKb296_oJtbLet0KIBA845SO5kMt8N0VYHS-yvNoZHKRHhz1ySoJyLP5ShUvTmVcokKYzWDl3MaJZGUsoYZhH8RvuzRUEa9n2CufCLhKojWsJS6DigDPm10yJjcCwkFV6AsRi0eSQCT6Al8RBjPKTueIXlBHcdsm9PkAJsgI3IzKeFboQkk30jMeCsjHZf1Le1YPT5TGCaINQ9VLSkUcDVCoyZsTWH-IxVWoJfmFLm3CT2vPwBhn9-SvgkvgEuoZgY7R5j3n1JHGieYGw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=iCIf7Iez7UY-uhIs0pPZRB8paQ859ytHKVSKPIfeJcB0UOAQk2pkq3GRXVilBzbYv8mwuQShEbpcNPA9NuwqnWKqNUAT5yACfzpSASLkfGwQDx4054Ey6Fw9cXi9k6iZCSfiFOJJFOFQl5o7LpT9lIoLR3oZaVGXXIQmXzOggaKoA7LHzesvMTAoB8mWvyshrP5Q5yHrAoIL7QswtsGTryTGnH9fL_-umlkXzcOFkQILt2kuPm_I96e2lqa6fe4E) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7403b168a4c04914838eda9fbd386f1f&_e=iCIf7Iez7UY-uhIs0pPZRB8paQ859ytHKVSKPIfeJcB0UOAQk2pkq3GRXVilBzbYv8mwuQShEbpcNPA9NuwqnWKqNUAT5yACfzpSASLkfGwQDx4054Ey6Fw9cXi9k6iZCSfiFOJJFOFQl5o7LpT9lIoLR3oZaVGXXIQmXzOggaKoA7LHzesvMTAoB8mWvyshrP5Q5yHrAoIL7QswtsGTryTGnH9fL_-umlkXzcOFkQILt2kuPm_I96e2lqa6fe4E) to unsubscribe. clean_body: The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" -- but they never use those words to describe the left. Friend, The fake news loves to throw around the terms "crazy" or "radical" – but they never use those words to describe the left. But... when liberals want to march to overthrow a freely elected president or call for a repeal of the 2nd Amendment, it's fine. Then, when conservatives like us stand for our values, we're lambasted as "crazy." Talk about a double standard! I don't think it's "crazy" to stand for our Constitution. Not sure whether you’ve seen this email from Emma, but it is incredibly important.
We are putting together a Rapid Response Fund to respond to our opponent’s misleading attack ad, and we need your help to raise another $8,000. http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
With only two weeks until the primary, we can’t afford to have unanswered attack ads blasting the internet.
Begin Forwarded Message:DEVELOPING: Regina’s opponent has launched an incredibly misleading digital attack ad.
Contribute now to help Regina have the resources to fight back and spread the truth >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO ]
Jason, Regina got into this race because she wanted to talk about her ideas to help everyday Californians. Our movement is powered by ideas, not cheap attacks.
Unfortunately, not everyone is as people-focused as Regina.
Her opponent has launched a negative digital ad attacking Regina. It’s a dirty trick, and it’s running NOW , misleading voters about Regina’s record.
We have to fight back.
Can you pitch in to our Rapid Response Fund NOW so that we have the resources in the door to continue spreading the truth? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
We are in the home stretch. The primary is just TWO WEEKS AWAY!
Undecided voters are making up their minds as you read this. We have to reach them so that our opponent’s misleading ad isn’t the last thing they see.
Contribute now to ensure we can blast Regina’s people-centered message >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
Can you help keep Regina's momentum going?
Grassroots donations make the difference in electing Democrats. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

Donate $100 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2]
Other amount [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
If we can’t counter this cheap trick, we might not be able to make it across the finish line in two weeks. This is make or break, and we need your help.
CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180523_2_2&amount=25&recurring=AUTO ]
Thanks for helping Regina cross the finish line!
Emma

body:
Joe took a lot of heat from McConnell and his allies for voting against the tax bill, but he did it because it was the right thing for Hoosiers. |
---

| | | **_MCCONNELL TAX BILL WILL DRIVE UP HEALTH CARE COSTS_**
** _\-- former Pres. Trump appointee Tom Price_**
---
**_[Pitch in so Joe can keep fighting to drive them down>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2109/7377f838/3fb18734/51f91936/1858870265/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-health-care-sabotage?refcode=20180523.2nd&amount=10")_**
Peter -- Former Health and Human Services Secretary Tom Price admitted what Joe's been saying all along: **the McConnell tax bill is a HUGE giveaway to wealthy campaign donors on the backs of middle-class families.**

Joe took a lot of heat from McConnell and his allies for voting against the tax bill, but he did it because it was the right thing for Hoosiers. Independent observers agree this tax plan will raise monthly health care premiums while cutting taxes for the insurance companies charging them, just like Secretary Price admitted.

If Rep. Braun wins in November, you can bet he'll vote for more laws that provide huge giveaways to the rich at the expense of working people.

**If we do nothing, big money wins. But if we band together against Rep. Braun, McConnell, and their billionaire machine, we win. Will you pitch in to be part of a campaign capable of reaching every Hoosier in the state before Election Day? >>**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: It's official. I'm running.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Today, I officially announced that I will run to be New York's next Attorney General.
#
Peter -
I want you to hear this news directly from me: **I'm in.**
I've been overwhelmed by the support and encouragement I've received over the past few weeks, and today I officially announced that I will run to be New York's next Attorney General.
Your message was loud and clear: People want an AG who is ready to take on the lawlessness, corruption and bigotry of the Trump Administration; who will serve as a check on Albany; and who will use the powers of the office to the full extent to rein in Wall Street and real estate. Most importantly, people want someone who knows her duty first and foremost is to the people.
**I 'm ready to do that. But the only way to beat these powerful forces is if we're in this together, so I have to ask:**
**[Can you make a $3 contribution today to help us build the movement we will need to win? I can't do this alone.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e36/6e822e2f/18beb51a/41721f12/1732704655/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjMtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-running?refcode=em180523-full")**
Running against Trump, corrupt politicians in Albany and Wall Street means that there are a lot of wealthy, powerful people who will do whatever they can to beat us.
They want someone who won't scrutinize or investigate them too much -- if at all. Their goal is to make sure the system keeps working for them.
Right now, they think the law doesn't apply to them.
So, let me be clear on this: If I have the honor to serve as your next Attorney General, they will feel the full weight of the law. Justice will be served.
**[If you're ready to help change our system, then we need you to donate $3 today to help send a message that we can and will win. We can only do that if all of us are in this together.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e36/6e822e2f/18beb51a/41721f12/1732704655/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjMtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-running?refcode=em180523-full")**
Thanks for chipping in and being with us on day one.
Best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e36/6e822e2f/18beb51a/41721f12/1732704655/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjMtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-running?refcode=em180523-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---

Click [here](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e36/6e822e2f/18beb51a/41721f13/1732704655/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. subject: my update for Jacky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team - I'll keep this short. We're coming down to the wire on tonight's pre-primary FEC deadline, and we still have $5,000 left to raise.
I'm preparing to update Jacky before we have to close the books and have our fundraising numbers go public, and I need to give her better news than what we have in right now.
[**Donations are being matched. Can you step up before midnight with a contribution of $5 and have it go twice as far?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd4a4/4fbb2af3/72420bee/5e8a29dc/4159269569/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY1NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk654-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
We HAVE to meet this deadline before midnight as we gear up to repeal and replace Dean Heller in November - but we're falling short with only a few hours to go. **[Chip in what you can right now.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd4a4/4fbb2af3/72420bee/5e8a29dc/4159269569/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY1NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk654-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") **
